title: Minimum Deletions to Make Array Beautiful
titleCn: 美化数组的最少删除数

testcases.input: nums = [1,1,2,3,5] Output: 1 Explanation: You can delete either nums[0] or nums[1] to make nums = [1,2,3,5] which is beautiful. It can be proven you need at least 1 deletion to make nums beautiful.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: You can delete either nums[0] or nums[1] to make nums = [1,2,3,5] which is beautiful. It can be proven you need at least 1 deletion to make nums beautiful.

testcases.input: nums = [1,1,2,2,3,3] Output: 2 Explanation: You can delete nums[0] and nums[5] to make nums = [1,2,2,3] which is beautiful. It can be proven you need at least 2 deletions to make nums beautiful.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: You can delete nums[0] and nums[5] to make nums = [1,2,2,3] which is beautiful. It can be proven you need at least 2 deletions to make nums beautiful.
